title: Autonomous AI Agent & Knowledge Base Support
description: Full differ engine support for Make.com's new AI Agent modules, enabling automation agencies to safely track, diff, and deploy advanced AI-driven workflows across environments.

changes.message: Deep AI Tool Tracking: The Differ Engine now fully parses Make.com's nested AI 'Tools', rendering them as distinct logic branches within the UI. Agencies can now visually audit advanced AI workflows and Knowledge Base modules with the same precision as standard routing logic.

Dynamic AI Connection Mapping: Safely deploy Make.com's unique AI provider connections. Seamlessly map your Sandbox AI models to secure Production credentials within the deployment modal before pushing live.

title: Visual Audits at Agency Speed: Native Icons & Polished Diff Cards
description: Accelerated deployment reviews with a massive visual overhaul to the Differ Engine, featuring native Make.com iconography and high-contrast logic comparison views.

changes.message: Instant Visual Recognition: Native Make.com application logos and color-coded built-in icons are now integrated directly into module cards. Teams can visually parse complex, multi-app client workflows at a glance, eliminating the need to manually read every module label.

Polished Deployment Cards: A complete redesign of the difference view cards introduces cleaner layouts, improved typography, and sharper status badges. These enhancements expedite the identification of logic changes between Sandbox and Production, significantly reducing cognitive load during critical deployment pushes.

title: Enterprise Scale, Smart Quotas & The Sceniform Playground
description: Unlocked massive blueprint support for professional automation agencies, added intelligent safeguards to protect deployment limits, and introduced an interactive, zero-friction sandbox to test drive the Differ Engine.

changes.message: Interactive Blueprint Playground: Experience the power of the Sceniform Differ Engine instantly. Agencies can now drag-and-drop Make.com JSON blueprints directly into our new unauthenticated sandbox to visually compare logic changes on the fly—no account required.

Global Environment Sync: Instantly refresh all scenarios, connections, webhooks, and data structures across both Sandbox and Production environments simultaneously with a single click, completely eliminating stale cache issues without reloading the page.
Unlimited Module Scale for Pro: The differ engine has been fully unlocked for Pro workspaces, allowing seamless comparison and deployment of massive, enterprise-grade workflows (20+ modules).
Smart Quota Protection: Sceniform now instantly pre-validates scenario complexity before loading the engine, ensuring you never waste a monthly comparison limit on an unsupported blueprint.

title: Agency Controls & Pro Tier Infrastructure
description: Introduced workspace-level usage limits, premium feature gating for large-scale deployments, and a completely modernized settings interface for agency administrators.

changes.message: Usage Quota System: Organizations now have transparent tracking of monthly scenario comparisons.

Pro Tier Feature Gating: High-value 'Push to Production' and environment-syncing capabilities are now exclusively available to Pro workspaces, allowing for more secure and governed deployment workflows.
Real-time Usage Insights: Integrated a color-coded quota widget that provides instant visibility into workspace comparison limits directly within the Scenarios sidebar.

title: Data Integrity & Environment Safeguards
description: Comprehensive support for Make.com Data Stores, preventing schema mismatches or broken production logic resulting from multi-environment syncing.

changes.message: Noise Reduction: Added a 'Hide Data Store Difference' toggle to filter out non-functional ID changes, allowing experts to focus purely on logic flow.

Intelligent Data Pruning: The deployment engine now automatically identifies and removes 'orphaned' fields that no longer exist in your production schemas, preventing dirty data injection during scenario updates.
Schema Mismatch Warnings: Sceniform now deeply audits the underlying structures of your Data Stores, flagging caution icons if your Sandbox and Production environments have drifted out of sync.

title: Safe Multi-Environment Syncing
description: Introduced full support for Make.com Data Structures and an automated 'cleanup' engine to ensure Production environments remain lean and error-free.

changes.message: Unified Environment Mapping: Seamlessly map Sandbox Data Structures to Production equivalents alongside Connections and Webhooks.
Visual Consistency Fix: Resolved an issue where Make.com's stale cache displayed incorrect labels. Sceniform now forcefully syncs the true API names during every deployment push.

title: Effortless Onboarding & Auto-Mapping
description: Upgraded the internal intelligence engine to automate the tedious parts of environment setup.

changes.message: Smart Environment Linker: The auto-mapping engine now uses a 3-tier fallback system to instantly link your client connections by matching Module IDs or App Types across accounts.

title: The Sceniform MVP Launch
description: The official debut of the first side-by-side blueprint differ designed specifically for professional automation agencies.

changes.message: Environment Binding: Verify and map every connection (Sandbox to Production) before a single change is pushed live.
Enterprise-Grade Vault: Implemented AES-encrypted API key storage and strict multi-tenant isolation for agency workspace management.

title: Complex Architecture Support
description: Upgraded the DAG parsing engine to handle the most advanced scenario architectures used by top-tier agencies.

changes.message: Advanced Logic Support: Full support for Routers, if/else logic, and Merge modules, ensuring variable paths are tracked correctly across unified branches.
Interactive Logic Tracing: Instant auto-scrolling to the origin module of any mapped variable, making audits of complex graphs 10x faster.

title: Mapping Readability & Engine Performance
description: Enhancements to how variable mappings are displayed and backend rendering performance.

changes.message: Human-Readable Mappings: The UI now parses and displays human-readable labels in mappings instead of raw Make.com variable IDs.
Added secure backend proxy caching (EF Core) for third-party module logos.

title: Alpha: Core DAG Visualization
description: The initial build of the Sceniform differ engine and vertical graph layout.

changes.message: Router Analysis: The engine now visually distinguishes between main routes, collapsing router branches, and explicitly identifies disabled routes.
Introduced the side-by-side blueprint viewer with intelligent indentation.
